nodes.label: Husky brand mark (Flask static) - stylized howling husky head silhouette in light gray
nodes.description: A minimalist line-art illustration of a husky's head in profile, depicted in a howling or upward-facing pose. Rendered in light gray/pale strokes on a white background with angular, geometric shapes forming the muzzle, ears, and mane. Served by the Flask app from the /static/img/ directory as the primary brand mark.
